highlights.title: Sensex, Nifty edge up on RBI liquidity boost, easing West Asia tensions, bank stocks outperform
Multibagger defence stock Apollo Micro Systems close to record high. Do you own?
US stock market today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 futures extend winning run amid chip stocks rally; Brent crude retreats
Studds Accessories shares rally 17% after BJP-led govt takes this step in West Bengal
Copper Falls With Rate Hike Prospects, AI Stocks Risk in Focus
Defence stocks rally: Data Patterns, Paras Defence, Zen Tech up to 10% as Nifty Defence index gains

daily_brief.key_insight: Range-bound tape with 50% breadth. No directional edge — let existing positions work, avoid fresh breakout trades, save dry powder for the next regime shift. Macro flow is mildly positive with 161 policy/global items in focus — factor this into position sizing. Sector dispersion is wide: Healthcare leads at 66 while Telecom lags at 0 — a stock-picker's tape.

conviction_board.name: IndusInd Bank
conviction_board.narrative: INDUSINDBK scores 54/100 on our engine. The trend is solidly positive — price sits above all key averages, though alignment isn't perfect. Momentum is picking up nicely — RSI at 60 has room to run before hitting overbought territory. The tape is chopping sideways with 50% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Banking is lagging the broader tape (score 29) — an extra headwind. Bull case: sustains above ₹923 and pushes towards ₹975 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹871 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Range-bound between ₹895 and ₹945. Patience over conviction. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
